query:
INSERT INTO
                        gbfs_stations
                            ( station_id
                            , name
                            , short_name
                            , lat
                            , lon
                            , region_id
                            , capacity
                            , is_virtual_station
                            , rental_uris
                            )
                        VALUES
                            ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? )
